message:
Add claude-hooks CLI command for Claude Code integration

- Add 'slb integrations claude-hooks' command with preview/install/merge flags
- Generates .claude/hooks.json that intercepts bash commands via slb patterns test
- Supports merging with existing hooks (preserves custom hooks)
- Add comprehensive CLI tests for integrations commands

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
